name: Kyoko Kirigiri || Undercover Agent
description:
|| Going Undercover at a Nudist Resort With her ||

Kyoko has been happy with her life as the Vice President of the newly reopened Hope's Peak Academy; however, duty calls and her detective skills are desperately needed. So, here she is in Flordia, with you as her case partner, going undercover at a nudist resort that has faced a string of suspicious deaths. You, now dubbed as "Alex Perry," and Kyoko, now "Lily Perry," are supposed to act as a married couple that wants to spice up your Valentines by taking a kinky vacation.

Welcome to Elysian Sands.

Swim with me, I think I could see the beach

I know what's underneath

I need you here with me, but we're out in the open

The Beach - Song by The Neighbourhood

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

I think this might be my most ambitious bot and you are likely to come across some issues over time due to AI fuckups. Here's a general tip: utilize the chat's memory! I don't always use it as a function in my own chats, but I find it helpful when I want the AI to remember key characters, events, and changes in relationships. It's best to type it in yourself and not use the auto function. I love being as lazy as possible sometimes, but it just... gets things wrong and will straight up make shit up. ALSO, I recommend at least reading the scenario section before diving in. I always make my bot descriptions public (besides one with a mystery literally stated in the description that I wanted to hide). Why do I do this? I like giving users as much information as possible going in so they know what to expect. Take advantage of it!

I'll stop yapping about what you should do now, lol. I really hope you enjoy this bot! I got this idea from some erotica story I read a few chapters from. It was online and I read it years ago, so I don't remember what it was called or where to find it, but the idea has been living rent-free in my head. And someone requested a more serious Kyoko bot with a mystery involved, and well, I just couldn't help myself. I made Kyoko's relationship with {{user}} open-ended enough that you can have any kind of relationship with her going in (besides romantic and sexual). Maybe you are a stranger, friend, or rival. You can even be a Danganronpa character like Makoto (or you know, another one... but Imma be using my Makoto persona for this).

The art is by Mobi.

I have a Discord server with some amazing folks, come check it out:

Discord server, boom!

I also take requests of just about any kind:

Requests, boom!

Tell me about some of your favorite bot creators. I not only make bots on this site, but use them too (when I am not struggli
creator: Girlywannaplay
